title: GenomeLens 热图
description: 用于把矩阵型结果渲染为热图，适合展示物种间相似度、基因集富集、距离矩阵或其他二维定量关系，帮助快速识别聚类格局、异常样本与强弱关联区域。
description_en: Renders matrix-style results as a heatmap. It is suitable for visualizing inter-species similarity, gene-set enrichment, distance matrices, or other two-dimensional quantitative relationships, helping users quickly identify clustering patterns, outliers, and regions of strong or weak association.
context: 二维定量关系与聚类结构展示。
context_en: Display of two-dimensional quantitative relationships and clustering structure.

params.label: 矩阵 CSV
params.description: 待绘制的矩阵 CSV 文件。行列通常代表物种、样本、基因集或其他比较单元，数值大小将决定热图中的颜色强弱。
params.description_en: Matrix CSV file to plot. Rows and columns typically represent species, samples, gene sets, or other comparison units, and the numeric values determine the color intensity in the heatmap.

params.label: 行分组文件
params.description: 行分组 TSV 文件路径。
params.description_en: Path to row groups TSV file.

params.label: 首行作为列分组
params.description: 是否将首行作为列分组。
params.description_en: Whether to use the first row as column groups.

params.label: 水平色条
params.description_en: Whether to display a horizontal color bar.
